name: AutoTextDefinition
summary: References an auto-text definition. Some auto-text definitions are mandatory. Mandatory auto-text definitions may not be removed, added, or modified. A mandatory AutoTextDefinition is one of the following types: Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_GROUP_NAME Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_COMPONENT_INSTANCE_NAME Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_COMPONENT_DEFINITION_NAME Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_VOLUME Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_FACE_AREA Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_EDGE_LENGTH Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_COORDINATES Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_DYNAMIC_COMPONENT_ATTRIBUTE Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_CLASSIFIER_ATTRIBUTE Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_SCENE_NAME Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_SCENE_DESCRIPTION Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_SCALE Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_SECTION_NAME Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_SECTION_SYMBOL

methods.name: display_file_extension?
methods.summary: The #display_file_extension? method returns whether the Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_FILE Layout::AutoTextDefinition displays the file extension.
methods.remarks: The #display_file_extension? method returns whether the Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_FILE Layout::AutoTextDefinition displays the file extension.

throws.when: if the Layout::AutoTextDefinition's type is not Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_FILE.

methods.name: display_full_path?
methods.summary: The #display_full_path? method returns whether the Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_FILE Layout::AutoTextDefinition displays the full path.
methods.remarks: The #display_full_path? method returns whether the Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_FILE Layout::AutoTextDefinition displays the full path.

throws.when: if the Layout::AutoTextDefinition's type is not Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_FILE.

methods.name: mandatory?
methods.summary: The #mandatory? method returns whether the Layout::AutoTextDefinition is mandatory or not.
methods.remarks: The #mandatory? method returns whether the Layout::AutoTextDefinition is mandatory or not. A mandatory Layout::AutoTextDefinition is one of the following types: Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_GROUP_NAME Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_COMPONENT_INSTANCE_NAME Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_COMPONENT_DEFINITION_NAME Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_VOLUME Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_FACE_AREA Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_EDGE_LENGTH Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_COORDINATES Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_DYNAMIC_COMPONENT_ATTRIBUTE Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_CLASSIFIER_ATTRIBUTE Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_SCENE_NAME Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_SCENE_DESCRIPTION Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_SCALE Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_SECTION_NAME Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_SECTION_SYMBOL

methods.name: renumber
methods.summary: The #renumber method iterates through all uses of the Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_SEQUENCE Layout::AutoTextDefinition and eliminates gaps and duplicates in the sequence.
methods.remarks: The #renumber method iterates through all uses of the Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_SEQUENCE Layout::AutoTextDefinition and eliminates gaps and duplicates in the sequence.

throws.when: if the Layout::AutoTextDefinition's type is not Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_SEQUENCE.

methods.name: tag
methods.summary: The #tag method returns the tag string of the Layout::AutoTextDefinition.
methods.remarks: The #tag method returns the tag string of the Layout::AutoTextDefinition.

methods.name: type
methods.summary: The #type method returns the type of the Layout::AutoTextDefinition.
methods.remarks: The #type method returns the type of the Layout::AutoTextDefinition. The type can be one of the following values: Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_FILE Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_PAGE_NAME Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_PAGE_NUMBER Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_CUSTOM_TEXT Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_DATE_CURRENT Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_DATE_CREATED Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_DATE_MODIFIED Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_DATE_PUBLISHED Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_GROUP_NAME Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_COMPONENT_INSTANCE_NAME Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_COMPONENT_DEFINITION_NAME Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_VOLUME Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_FACE_AREA Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_EDGE_LENGTH Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_COORDINATES Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_DYNAMIC_COMPONENT_ATTRIBUTE Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_CLASSIFIER_ATTRIBUTE Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_SCENE_NAME Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_SCENE_DESCRIPTION Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_SCALE Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_SECTION_NAME Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_MODEL_SECTION_SYMBOL Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_PAGE_COUNT Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_SEQUENCE

properties.summary: The #== method checks to see if the two Layout::AutoTextDefinitions are equal.
properties.remarks: The #== method checks to see if the two Layout::AutoTextDefinitions are equal. This checks whether the Ruby Objects are pointing to the same internal object.

properties.name: custom_text
properties.summary: The #custom_text method returns the custom text of the Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_CUSTOM_TEXT Layout::AutoTextDefinition.
properties.remarks: The #custom_text method returns the custom text of the Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_CUSTOM_TEXT Layout::AutoTextDefinition.

properties.name: date_format
properties.summary: The #date_format method returns the date format of a Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_DATE_* Layout::AutoTextDefinition.
properties.remarks: The #date_format method returns the date format of a Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_DATE_* Layout::AutoTextDefinition.

properties.name: display_file_extension
properties.summary: The #display_file_extension= method sets whether the Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_FILE Layout::AutoTextDefinition displays the file extension.
properties.remarks: The #display_file_extension= method sets whether the Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_FILE Layout::AutoTextDefinition displays the file extension.

properties.name: display_full_path
properties.summary: The #display_full_path= method sets whether the Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_FILE Layout::AutoTextDefinition displays the full path.
properties.remarks: The #display_full_path= method sets whether the Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_FILE Layout::AutoTextDefinition displays the full path.

properties.name: end_page
properties.summary: The #end_page method returns the end page for the Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_PAGE_COUNT Layout::AutoTextDefinition.
properties.remarks: The #end_page method returns the end page for the Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_PAGE_COUNT Layout::AutoTextDefinition.

properties.name: increment
properties.summary: The #increment method returns the increment value for Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_SEQUENCE Layout::AutoTextDefinitions.
properties.remarks: The #increment method returns the increment value for Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_SEQUENCE Layout::AutoTextDefinitions.

properties.name: name
properties.summary: The #name method returns the name of the Layout::AutoTextDefinition.
properties.remarks: The #name method returns the name of the Layout::AutoTextDefinition.

properties.name: number_style
properties.summary: The #number_style method returns the numbering style for Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_PAGE_NUMBER, Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_PAGE_COUNT, and Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_SEQUENCE Layout::AutoTextDefinitions.
properties.remarks: The #number_style method returns the numbering style for Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_PAGE_NUMBER, Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_PAGE_COUNT, and Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_SEQUENCE Layout::AutoTextDefinitions. The numbering style can be one of the following values: Layout::AutoTextDefinition::NUMBER_STYLE_ARABIC Layout::AutoTextDefinition::NUMBER_STYLE_ARABIC_PADDED Layout::AutoTextDefinition::NUMBER_STYLE_UC_ALPHA Layout::AutoTextDefinition::NUMBER_STYLE_LC_ALPHA Layout::AutoTextDefinition::NUMBER_STYLE_UC_ROMAN Layout::AutoTextDefinition::NUMBER_STYLE_LC_ROMAN

properties.name: page_number_style
properties.remarks: Deprecated. LayOut 2022.0 This method is deprecated in favor of the more generic #number_style method that also works on Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_PAGE_COUNT and Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_SEQUENCE Layout::AutoTextDefinitions. The #page_number_style method returns the numbering style for Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_PAGE_NUMBER Layout::AutoTextDefinitions. The numbering style can be one of the following values: Layout::AutoTextDefinition::NUMBER_STYLE_ARABIC Layout::AutoTextDefinition::NUMBER_STYLE_ARABIC_PADDED Layout::AutoTextDefinition::NUMBER_STYLE_UC_ALPHA Layout::AutoTextDefinition::NUMBER_STYLE_LC_ALPHA Layout::AutoTextDefinition::NUMBER_STYLE_UC_ROMAN Layout::AutoTextDefinition::NUMBER_STYLE_LC_ROMAN

properties.name: sequence_format
properties.summary: The #sequence_format method returns the sequence format of a Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_SEQUENCE Layout::AutoTextDefinition.
properties.remarks: The #sequence_format method returns the sequence format of a Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_SEQUENCE Layout::AutoTextDefinition.

properties.name: sequence_type
properties.summary: The #sequence_type method returns how the Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_SEQUENCE Layout::AutoTextDefinition operates over multiple pages in a document.
properties.remarks: The #sequence_type method returns how the Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_SEQUENCE Layout::AutoTextDefinition operates over multiple pages in a document. The sequence type can be one of the following values: Layout::AutoTextDefinition::SEQUENCE_TYPE_PER_DOCUMENT Layout::AutoTextDefinition::SEQUENCE_TYPE_PER_PAGE

properties.name: start_index
properties.summary: The #start_index method returns the start index for Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_PAGE_NUMBER, Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_PAGE_COUNT, and Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_SEQUENCE Layout::AutoTextDefinitions.
properties.remarks: The #start_index method returns the start index for Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_PAGE_NUMBER, Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_PAGE_COUNT, and Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_SEQUENCE Layout::AutoTextDefinitions.

properties.name: start_page
properties.summary: The #start_page method returns the start page for Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_PAGE_NUMBER and Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_PAGE_COUNT Layout::AutoTextDefinitions.
properties.remarks: The #start_page method returns the start page for Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_PAGE_NUMBER and Layout::AutoTextDefinition::TYPE_PAGE_COUNT Layout::AutoTextDefinitions.
